headline: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish on Becton, Dickinson and Company Stock?
summary: After the stock’s decline this year, do Wall Street analysts see a recovery in Becton, Dickinson and Company?

headline: Peter Menziuso Named EVP and President, BD Interventional
summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) (NYSE: BDX), a leading global medical technology company, today announced that Peter Menziuso has been named executive vice president and president, BD Interventional, effective June 1.

raw.headline: Peter Menziuso Named EVP and President, BD Interventional
